meaning: n.褐色砂石,赤褐色砂石建筑adj.上流社会的,富有阶级的
examples: McCaw is my boss at the Brownstone Company.
For several years, I managed a department for the Brownstone Company in Detroit, Michigan.
Well, for several years, I managed a department for the Brownstone Company in Detroit, Michigan.
Gusts of wind ripped leaves off the trees in front of the sturdy brownstone buildings.
Brownstone Brooklyn makes a dignified statement with its housing stock, albeit a quiet, old-fashioned one.
